    Serialized Form

    • Package controller

      • Class controller.BudgetTracker

        class BudgetTracker extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • budgets
            List<Budget> budgets

    • Package model

      • Class model.Budget

        class Budget extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • budgetId
            String budgetId
          • category
            String category
          • limit
            BigDecimal limit
          • period
            String period

      • Class model.Expense

        class Expense extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • amount
            double amount
            Monetary amount of the expense
          • category
            String category
            Category of the expense (e.g., "Food", "Housing")
          • date
            LocalDate date
            Date when the expense occurred
          • description
            String description
            Optional description of the expense
          • id
            String id
            Unique identifier for the expense
          • isRecurring
            boolean isRecurring
            Flag indicating whether this is a recurring expense
          • recurringFrequency
            String recurringFrequency
            Frequency of recurrence if recurring (e.g., "weekly", "monthly")

      • Class model.Income

        class Income extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • amount
            BigDecimal amount
            Monetary amount of the income, using BigDecimal for precise currency calculations
          • date
            LocalDate date
            Date when the income was received
          • description
            String description
            Optional description of the income
          • id
            String id
            Unique identifier for the income entry
          • recurring
            boolean recurring
            Flag indicating whether this is a recurring income
          • recurringPeriod
            String recurringPeriod
            Period of recurrence if recurring (e.g., "weekly", "monthly", "yearly")
          • source
            String source
            Source of the income (e.g., "Salary", "Freelance")
          • userId
            int userId
            User ID to associate this income with a specific user

      • Class model.Reminder

        class Reminder extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • amount
            double amount
            The financial amount associated with this reminder
          • completed
            boolean completed
            Flag indicating whether the reminder has been completed
          • dueDate
            LocalDate dueDate
            The date when the financial obligation is due
          • name
            String name
            The name or description of the reminder
          • reminderDate
            LocalDate reminderDate
            The date when the user should be reminded about this obligation
          • reminderId
            int reminderId
            Unique identifier for the reminder
          • userId
            int userId
            The user ID to whom this reminder belongs

      • Class model.User

        class User extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • name
            String name
            The full name of the user.
          • password
            String password
            The password used for authentication.
          • UID
            int UID
            The unique identifier for the user. Once set, it cannot be changed.
          • username
            String username
            The username used for authentication.
